texto: Sometimes we so unnecessarily believe that the thing we can see is best for us. But, it is only because we are not willing to see beyond it.When a diver gets into sea, he deserves the pearl, not the pebbles. If he satiates himself with the pebbles, due to fear of drowning, someone else will take the pearl.You have gotten into this life. Do not get disheartened with the pebbles, you deserve the pearl.
explicacao: Citação de Neha Katyal sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Sometimes we so unnecessarily believe that the thing we can see is best for us. But, it is only b…” articula motivacao, inspiracional, vida em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e vida.
